prompt: Create a workflow with an HTTP POST endpoint at /leads that receives lead data. First validate the required fields (name, email, company). If validation fails, return an error. If valid, check if the lead already exists by email. Existing leads get updated, new leads get created. Both paths then trigger a notification to the sales team with the lead details.

checklist.item: Validates required fields (name, email, company) before processing
Branches based on validation result (success vs failure)
Returns an error response when validation fails
Checks if a lead already exists by email after successful validation
Branches based on whether the lead already exists (existing vs new)
Updates the existing lead record when a match is found by email
Creates a new lead record when no match is found
Both the update and create paths converge to trigger a sales team notification
Validation checks specifically for name, email, and company fields
Lead lookup is performed using the email field as the identifier
Sales team notification includes lead details (name, email, company)
